data.body:
## Description
Add test_gate_merge_10_file_incoming_only_single_commit to tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate.sh: create repo where main has 12 changed files, worktree touched none, merge, assert hook exits 0 in single pass without requiring record-test-status.sh.

## TDD Exemption
Integration exemption criterion 1: the merge-filtering boundary (MERGE_HEAD detection, merge-base computation, STAGED_FILES filter) is fully tested by Task 1 RED tests. This task adds acceptance-level validation of the complete flow.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests pass including the 10+ file validation test
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate.sh 2>&1 | tail -1 | grep FAILED:.0
- [ ] test_gate_merge_10_file_incoming_only_single_commit exists and passes
  Verify: grep -q test_gate_merge_10_file tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate.sh
